title: Si + present + imperative
subtitle: Give instructions with conditions.
overview: This pattern is common in directions and advice.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: If you are hungry, eat something.
If you do not understand, ask.

items.es: Si tienes frío, cierra la ventana.
items.en: If you are cold, close the window.

items.es: Si no sabes la palabra, búscala.
items.en: If you do not know the word, look it up.

items.es: Si estás cansado, descansa un poco.
items.en: If you are tired, rest a little.

items.es: Si pierdes la llave, habla con la recepción.
items.en: If you lose the key, speak with reception.

items.es: Si quieres mejorar, practica en voz alta.
items.en: If you want to improve, practice aloud.
